g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the parent input channels')
sendPrompt('How does the physician on/off toggle work?')
sendPrompt('Explain the AI triage engine in detail')
g.text: Captures child name · age · symptoms · history · attachments — calms parent — never diagnoses

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What medical knowledge sources does the system use?')
g.text: PubMed API · PAHO guidelines · curated docs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the triage decision logic work?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the AI detects an emergency?')
g.text: Immediate redirect to ER — no delay

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the non-urgent parent response look like?')
sendPrompt('What structured data does the system capture per conversation?')
g.text: Child name · age · symptoms · triage level · parent contact · attachments · full transcript · timestamp

svg.text: ⚠ Images: clarify whether AI analyzes or forwards only — liability implications differ

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is per-patient longitudinal data stored?')
g.text: Per-patient record (longitudinal) · encrypted · Ley 29733 compliant · configurable retention

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the physician dashboard contain?')
g.text: Queue by priority · transcript + audio · Impresión Dx.? · Desenlace (EMG/OBS) · VoBo sign-off · attachments

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What actions can the physician take after reviewing?')
g.text: Calls back · refers · no action needed

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the VoBo audit sign-off and why does it matter?')
